reasoning: Only 9 months remain until 2026. Major AI executives (like Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis) explicitly predict full AGI is 5-10 years away given current technical bottlenecks like scaling plateaus. OpenAI's internal scale tracks progress from Level 1 to Level 5 (AGI); they only recently reached Level 2 (Reasoners) via models like o1. Making a leap across three transformational levels (Agents, Innovators, Organizations) and publicly announcing it within 9 months is technologically and physically implausible. Furthermore, Sam Altman has stated the term AGI is becoming "less useful," meaning a definitive PR announcement that fulfills the strict resolution criteria of "any intellectual task" before 2026 is highly unlikely. The recent Manifold market price of 5% reflects residual long-shot and timeline bias; the empirical base rate for paradigm shifts taking <1 year is near-zero.
